name: Oven French Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Peel potatoes and slice into French fries.
3. Lay the fries out on a paper towel, patting them dry so they are as dry as possible.
4. Place the fries in a large bowl and drizzle with oil, tossing to coat evenly.
5. Spread the fries in a single layer on a large baking sheet.
6. Sprinkle the dressing mix and chopped parsley over all the fries.
7. Bake for 25 minutes, then carefully flip the fries once.
8. Return the fries to the oven and increase the temperature to 450°F.
9. Continue baking for 3 to 5 more minutes until the potatoes are tender and start to brown.
